sub_modules.fft16_bit_reverse: Combinational bit-reversal mapper used while loading natural-order input samples into DIT order.
sub_modules.fft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient lookup table for N=16 cosine and sine values.
sub_modules.fft16_butterfly: Combinational radix-2 complex butterfly with fixed-point twiddle multiplication and FFT/IFFT twiddle sign selection.
sub_modules.fft16_ifft_scale: Combinational final output scaler that divides IFFT results by N=16 while leaving FFT results unscaled.
